items.user_turn: I need a rollout package and operational checklist to deploy the recorded client interview simulations and intake guides to volunteers — audience is about 6–8 intake volunteers; primary objectives are trauma-informed listening and identifying mandatory‑reporting triggers; deliverables should include a consent script, storage and access rules for the recordings (stored on Google Drive at /org/legalclinic/training/intake_simulations, administered by emily.redfeather@goggle.com, encryption at rest enabled, two‑year retention, access limited to the admin plus two facilitators), an evaluation rubric, and a one‑day facilitator run‑through; preferred rollout is the week of May 10–14, 2026 with one 6‑hour facilitator day and four 2‑hour volunteer sessions, and the budget is $3,500 (for facilitator fees, transcription/redaction tools, and stipends). The simulations cover domestic violence and sexual‑assault survivor profiles, so consent must prohibit disclosure of identifying details and include mandatory‑reporting clauses; I also have an intake_sheet reference (ID X123-4567-890) and an audio file that may need redaction and transcription work.

items.user_turn: Please revise the modular compliance checklist using pilot feedback from Hopewell Community Center and Riverstone Outreach; I can follow up privately with the named program contacts. Both organizations handle sensitive data—client mental-health intake notes, donor records that include partial SSNs, and volunteer background-check reports. We have a grant deadline at the end of June 2026 and an implementation budget of $6,500 per year. Produce a finalized checklist with plain-language guidance, fillable templates (data inventory, privacy notice, breach checklist), a short implementation plan that fits the budget and capacity, and a follow-up email to the pilots to validate changes and outline next steps.
